# Orthogonal Factorial Models {#orthogonal-factorial-models}

```{r orthogonal-factorial-models-chapter-setup, include=FALSE}
source("../shared/setup.R")

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  fig.path = "_main_files/figure-html/orthogonal-factorial-models-",
  cache.path = "../build/cache/book/orthogonal-factorial-models/"
)
```

```{r child-orthogonal-factorial-models, child="../lecture-content/23-orthogonal-factorial-models.Rmd"}
```
